title: coleus subspicatus
intro: Coleus subspicatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coleus subspicatus include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and lower blood pressure. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, with the leaves and flowers being used in various herbal preparations.
